response.step_by_step_log: The video starts with the VTuber, Vestia Zeta, introducing merchandise. At 02:31, the stage setup changes, and she begins performing an original song. The on-screen text at 02:57 identified the song as 'Break It Down' and credited 'Lyrics, Music, Arrangement: Ryo 'LEFTY' Miyata'. I performed a search for '"Break It Down" Ryo LEFTY Miyata Japanese and English lyrics', which confirmed the song title, artist, and provided both original (Japanese) and translated (English) lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features a VTuber, Vestia Zeta, presenting her merchandise from 00:00 to 02:30, followed by a live performance of her original song 'Break It Down' from 02:30 until 04:58.

scenes.description: Vestia Zeta presenting her merchandise, including plushies and voice packs.
Vestia Zeta performing her original song 'Break It Down' on a 3D stage with silhouette background dancers.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Goin', goin' my way, mou hottoite
Tomerannai netsu mi makasete
Korigori da rule wa break it down
Gaman dekinai, let me free
Me ga kurande shimai sou na
Idetachi no mermaid akogareteta kke
But then, ima wa nanimo hibikanai
I know who I am, I
Brand-new ni wa akame
Ima wa kanzen, mushi yo
Nan-dem, adi no
Greedy style
Dasai akami mo kyoumi nai no
Ari no mama de itai
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Goin', goin' my way, just leave me alone
Let myself go, caught up in the unstoppable heat
I'm fed up, the rule is break it down
I can't stand it, let me free
Was I aspiring to be that
Mermaid with the appearance that's blinding?
But then, now nothing resonates with me
I know who I am, I
I'm turning red to the brand-new
Now I'm completely ignoring it
Whatever, adi's
Greedy style
I have no interest in uncool things
I want to be who I am
